official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound waypoint remove body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns waypoint to packet id 0x8a.
The generated fixture uses ClientboundTrackedWaypointPacket.removeWaypoint(UUID), which constructs Operation.UNTRACK plus TrackedWaypoint.empty(UUID).
The official body writes the UNTRACK operation and empty tracked-waypoint identifier/type payload.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded operation, decoded waypoint id, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove track/update operations, waypoint position/chunk/azimuth/icon semantics, world state, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer track/update operations, waypoint position/chunk/azimuth/icon semantics, world state, or client-load behavior.
